security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:11434 http://localhost:11434

bundle.shortDescription: Privacy-first local LLM writing companion for researchers
bundle.longDescription: ScholarScribe runs open LLMs (Gemma, Qwen, Llama, Phi) entirely on your device via Ollama. It helps researchers analyze their own writing style, generate compliant AI-use disclosure statements, and understand how AI detectors work — without ever sending text to the cloud.
